markets.title: Trade The World's
markets.description: Access cryptocurrencies, forex, commodities and major indices through Orion Trade Hub's institutional-grade trading platform. Monitor price movements in real time and execute trades with confidence.

header.title: Everything You Need
header.description: Orion Trade Hub combines institutional execution, AI-powered insights, advanced portfolio management, multi-asset trading and enterprise-grade security into one premium trading experience.

vip.title: VIP Accounts
vip.description: Premium execution, institutional pricing and dedicated relationship managers.

ai.title: AI Insights
ai.description: Real-time market intelligence powered by advanced trading algorithms.

execution.title: Fast Execution
execution.description: Ultra-low latency infrastructure for rapid order execution worldwide.

security.title: Secure Platform
security.description: Enterprise-grade encryption and multi-layer account protection.

assets.title: Multi-Asset Trading
assets.description: Trade crypto, forex, commodities, indices and equities from one account.

portfolio.title: Managed Portfolios
portfolio.description: Professional portfolio management with institutional risk controls.

hero.title: Institutional Trading
hero.subtitle: Experience institutional-grade execution across Crypto, Forex, Commodities and Global Equities through one beautifully engineered trading platform.

mobile.label: MOBILE PLATFORM
mobile.title: Trade Anywhere.
mobile.description: Orion Trade Hub delivers institutional-grade execution, portfolio monitoring, AI-assisted insights, and live market access from a beautifully engineered mobile experience.

coin.title: Orion
coin.description: Join the Orion Coin early-access list and receive updates on launch announcements, ecosystem utilities and platform rewards.

reviews.title: What Traders Are Saying
items: Very smooth platform. Real-time pricing feels professional.
Clean UI and fast execution. Love the trading experience.
Charts are responsive and accurate. Great work.
Feels like a real exchange. Very impressive design.
Simple, fast, and reliable trading interface.
One of the best demo trading platforms I've used.
Execution speed and UI are top tier.
Finally a clean crypto trading UI that feels real.
Love the live market feel. Very polished.

contact.title: Speak With Our Team
contact.description: Our specialists are available to assist with account opening, platform guidance, institutional services and general enquiries.

about.title: About Orion Trade Hub
about.description: Orion Trade Hub is a next-generation trading platform built for real-time market execution, AI-powered analytics, and institutional-level performance across cryptocurrencies, forex, and global markets.

footer.mobileMaintenance: Mobile apps are currently under maintenance. They will be available soon.
footer.careersMessage: Careers are coming soon. We are currently building our hiring program.

cardServices.title: Orion Debit Card
cardServices.description: Manage your Orion Debit Card application, track your application status, and access premium card services.
cardServices.applicationSubmitted: Your Orion Debit Card application has been received. Please make payment of 10 percent of total profit externally through your assigned trader.
cardServices.depositMessage: Deposits are processed manually by your assigned account manager. Please contact support to fund your investment account.
cardServices.withdrawMessage: Withdrawal requests are reviewed and processed by your assigned account manager. Please contact support to initiate a withdrawal.

depositModal.title: Deposit Gateway
depositModal.description: Deposits are handled manually by your assigned account manager to ensure secure funding, identity verification, and regulatory compliance. Once your payment has been confirmed, your trading balance will be updated promptly.
depositModal.assistance: For deposit assistance, please contact your assigned account manager via email or any secure communication channel. They will provide you with the necessary instructions and support to complete your deposit securely.
depositModal.instructions: To begin a deposit, please contact your assigned account manager. Payment instructions will be provided after verification of your trading account.

withdrawalModal.title: Withdrawal Request
withdrawalModal.description: Withdrawal requests are processed manually by your assigned account manager after identity verification and compliance review. Processing times may vary depending on your selected payment method.
withdrawalModal.assistance: For withdrawal assistance, please contact your assigned account manager via email or any secure communication channel. They will guide you through the withdrawal process and provide any required instructions.
withdrawalModal.instructions: To initiate a withdrawal, please contact your assigned account manager. Funds will be released after successful verification and approval.

securityMobile.title: Institutional-Grade Security
securityMobile.description: Your assets are protected by enterprise-grade encryption, multi-layer authentication, continuous monitoring, and resilient cloud infrastructure built for modern financial markets.
